context7.description: Live, version-accurate library docs — add 'use context7' to any prompt

playwright.description: Browser automation for testing and web interaction

filesystem.description: Read/write files — agent can explore and edit the project

postgres.description: Query DB from chat — inspect schemas, debug data (optional; set DATABASE_URL if you use Postgres)

github.description: Create PRs, read issues, manage branches from Cursor

brave-search.description: Search for latest API docs, changelogs, error solutions in real time

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph — architectural decisions, preferences across sessions

sequential-thinking.description: Step-by-step reasoning for complex agent and LLM pipeline design

sentry.description: Pull production errors with stack traces — fix without leaving Cursor
